2026-06-29::dinner.name: Ground Beef Pasta with Spaghetti Sauce
2026-06-29::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs cooked ground beef, jar spaghetti sauce, can diced tomatoes, rotini pasta, shredded cheese
2026-06-29::dinner.note: Uses cooked ground beef; quick weeknight pasta

2026-06-30::dinner.name: Brined Roast Chicken with Roasted Sweet Potatoes and Green Beans
2026-06-30::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs raw chicken, kosher salt, sugar, garlic, sweet potatoes, fresh green beans, olive oil, seasoning
2026-06-30::dinner.note: Anchor brined chicken; brine starts morning

2026-07-01::dinner.name: Spinach Pie with Caesar Salad (Date Night — Kids eat simple)
2026-07-01::dinner.ingredients: two pie crusts, frozen spinach, eggs, shredded cheese, white onion, romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing
2026-07-01::dinner.note: Meatless; Date Night — easy kid-friendly side

2026-07-02::dinner.name: Cajun Sausages with Wild Rice and Sautéed Mixed Vegetables
2026-07-02::dinner.ingredients: four Cajun sausages, parboiled rice, frozen mixed vegetables, butter, onion, bell pepper, seasoning

2026-07-03::dinner.name: Friday Fish Fry — Canned Salmon Patties with French Fries and Canned Green Beans
2026-07-03::dinner.ingredients: 2 cans pink salmon, breadcrumbs, eggs, flour, seasoning, frozen french fries, canned green beans, butter
2026-07-03::dinner.note: Meatless Friday; uses canned salmon on hand

2026-07-04::dinner.name: Fourth of July Cookout — Hamburgers with French Fries, Corn, and Fruit
2026-07-04::dinner.ingredients: four hamburger patties, hamburger buns, shredded cheese, frozen french fries, frozen corn, green grapes, strawberries, blueberries

2026-07-05::dinner.name: Ziplock Buffet — Leftover Roast Chicken Tacos with Refried Beans and Rice
2026-07-05::dinner.ingredients: leftover roast chicken, tortillas, refried beans, parboiled rice, shredded cheese, salsa verde, romaine lettuce

2026-07-06::dinner.name: Lentil Soup with Sourdough Bread
